setupInstructions.message: Run the following commands to install required testing packages:
setupInstructions.alternativeMethod: Add the PackageReference elements to your .csproj file and run 'dotnet restore'

fileReports.summary: Added comprehensive tests for UnitTest1 class, covering method invocation, constructor, and stability scenarios
fileReports.recommendations: Consider adding more specific test scenarios and implementing meaningful logic in Test1() method
keyImprovements: Verified method stability with multiple invocations
fileReports.note: Current implementation lacks specific business logic, so tests are minimal

fileReports.summary: Added 8 comprehensive test cases covering constructor validation, message production, error handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding more robust error handling in writeMessage method
Add logging mechanism instead of Console.WriteLine for better testability
Implement more granular exception handling for Kafka-specific errors
fileReports.note: Tests use localhost:9092 as bootstrap servers - may need configuration for actual Kafka setup

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for Startup class covering configuration, service registration, and environment-specific configurations
recommendations: Add more detailed configuration binding tests
Consider adding integration tests with WebApplicationFactory
Implement more granular environment configuration tests
fileReports.note: Ensure proper mocking of dependencies and configuration sections

fileReports.summary: Added comprehensive test coverage for ConsumerWrapper, testing constructor validation, message reading, exception handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding more detailed logging for consume exceptions
Implement a more robust error handling strategy in readMessage()
Add configuration options for timeout and cancellation
fileReports.note: Tests use Moq for mocking Kafka consumer dependencies

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive tests for Program.cs startup configuration and host initialization
fileReports.recommendations: Consider extracting complex startup logic into separate configurable methods for easier testing
fileReports.note: Tests cover basic startup scenarios without deep integration testing

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive unit tests for OrderRequest model covering constructor, property initialization, enum validation, and edge cases
recommendations: Consider adding data validation attributes for stronger model validation
Add custom validation logic for quantity and product name if needed
Implement custom ToString() or equality methods for better object representation
keyImprovements: Validated default and custom object creation scenarios
Tested edge cases like null and zero values
fileReports.note: Tests assume no complex validation rules exist in the current model implementation

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for OrderController with 8 test cases covering various scenarios including valid requests, invalid model states, serialization, and edge cases
recommendations: Consider adding logging for better traceability
Implement more robust error handling in ProducerWrapper
keyImprovements: Verified serialization and producer message writing
Added theory tests for multiple scenarios
fileReports.note: Ensure ProducerWrapper and OrderRequest classes are properly defined with necessary properties

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ProcessOrdersService with 8 test cases covering constructor initialization, order processing, serialization, error handling, and configuration scenarios
recommendations: Add more robust error handling in ExecuteAsync method
Consider adding logging for better traceability
Implement more granular exception handling for message processing
fileReports.note: Tests assume availability of ConsumerWrapper and ProducerWrapper classes with specific method signatures
